title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Roche India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Roche India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
